use_cases: Creating bold hero section headlines with an outline/stroke visual effect
Styling prominent call-to-action text on landing pages
Adding visual depth to section titles in marketing materials
Creating branded typography for social media graphics and banners
Designing feature labels and category headers in product pages
ai_summary: A lightweight text styling component that renders bold text with an outline/stroke effect using CSS webkit properties. Supports responsive sizing and dark mode with automatic stroke color adjustment. Ideal for creating visually distinctive headlines and section titles in hero sections, landing pages, and marketing materials where text needs to stand out with a modern outlined aesthetic.
